rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF CECILE EGGENS KALTHOFF
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE CONSERVATORSHIP OF PERSON AND ESTATE
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/3/20 (next available). All threshold issues have not been addressed. The following are noted: 1) receipt of distribution attached to declaration filed on 11/22/19 is not signed; 2) bond calculation is not provided in 12/23/19 declaration; 3) accounting schedules are attached to 12/23/19 declaration, but no explanation is provided as to why (if accounting has been amended, an amendment must be filed). Filed stamped copy of newly filed pleading will be due at least 2 weeks prior.
